message:
⬆️ Upgrade React 18 → 19, R3F v8 → v9, drei v9 → v10 (#5042)

- react/react-dom 18.3.1 → 19.2.4
- @react-three/fiber 8.17.10 → 9.5.0
- @react-three/drei 9.122.0 → 10.7.7
- @types/react and @types/react-dom → v19
- Remove forwardRef from Button, GitHubActivity, GitHubCIMonitor
  (React 19 passes ref as a prop)
- Fix useRef() calls to include initial value (required in React 19)
- Update RefObject<T> types to RefObject<T | null> throughout
- Replace JSX.Element with ReactElement (JSX namespace removed)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
